channel.title: NAS Busani, M Tosi, P Mighali, P Vandelli, R D'Amico, M Marietta, F Forfori, A Donati, G Cinnella, A De Monte, D Pasero, G Bellani, C Tascini, G Foti, M Ranieri, M Girardis | PlatCOVID

image.title: NAS Busani, M Tosi, P Mighali, P Vandelli, R D'Amico, M Marietta, F Forfori, A Donati, G Cinnella, A De Monte, D Pasero, G Bellani, C Tascini, G Foti, M Ranieri, M Girardis

item.title: Multi-centre, three arm, randomized controlled trial on the use of methylprednisolone and unfractionated heparin in critically ill ventilated patients with pneumonia from SARS-CoV-2 infection: A structured summary of a study protocol for a randomised controlled trial.
